<!--
Thanks for the PR! A few quick boxes to tick — most of these you can fill in once and copy across PRs.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking, additive)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires a minor version bump per [VERSIONING.md](../docs/VERSIONING.md))
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build / CI / publishing change

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew :download:jvmTest :engine-llama:jvmTest` passes locally
- [ ] New behaviour has a test (or there's a comment in the PR explaining why a test isn't practical)
- [ ] Public API changes have KDoc
- [ ] If `:core` is touched, [VERSIONING.md](../docs/VERSIONING.md) is followed
- [ ] If new known limitations are introduced, `docs/known-issues.md` has an entry
- [ ] If user-visible, the next-release notes (`docs/releases/v*.md`) mention it

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #N, Fixes #N, or "no related issue" -->

## Verification

<!-- How did you check this works? Specific commands or steps a reviewer can repeat. -->
